title: athlete — published macros
description: Two request-level macros that surface the resolved active athlete from the RequestContext. Only /me/athletes routes + per-athlete sub-routes (medical / emergency-contact / consents) load this.
namespace_note: Macros extend Illuminate\Http\Request. Middleware-set context bleeds through the Request accessor without needing to plumb it through service constructors.

macros.name: Request::activeAthlete
macros.adds: A single accessor on the framework Request class that returns the resolved Athlete model (or null when no athlete context).
macros.description: Reads from RequestContext::athlete() set by the route-model binding in per-athlete routes. Lazy-loads the model on first access.

macros.name: Request::activeAthleteId
macros.adds: Convenience accessor returning just the ID.

blueprint_macros.name: Blueprint::athleteEnrollmentTimestamps
blueprint_macros.adds: Adds the shared column family for athlete-lifecycle-adjacent tables: enrolled_at (datetime) + left_at (datetime, nullable). Used by future athlete_branches (Wave 3b multi-branch pivot) + attendance::AttendanceRecord (Wave 4).

blueprint_macros.name: Blueprint::withdrawalFields
blueprint_macros.adds: Adds the withdrawal-reason column family: withdrawal_reason (enum, nullable) + withdrawal_notes (text, nullable) + withdrawn_at (date, nullable) + withdrawn_by_user_id (uuid, nullable). Used by Athlete + AthleteEnrollment + any future withdrawal-tracking table.
